title: Public consultations and engagement — Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada - Canada.ca
content:
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada

## Public consultations and engagement
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) regularly consults key partners on issues that affect Canadians. Public engagement helps us make program and policy decisions. They let us better understand the views of a wide range of:

## Ongoing consultations
- 2026 consultations on immigration levels
- 2026 consultations on potential Express Entry reforms Archived May 2026
- 2025 consultations on economic priorities for category-based selection in Express Entry Archived August 2025
- 2025 consultations on immigration levels Archived July 2025
- 2024 consultations on economic priorities for category-based selection in Express Entry Archived June 2024
- 2024 consultations on immigration levels Archived June 2024
- Consulting and cooperating with Indigenous Peoples on border mobility Archived December 2023
- An immigration system for Canada’s future: Strengthening our communities Archived November 2023
- 2023 consultations on immigration levels Archived July 2023
- 2022 consultations on enhancing Express Entry through category-based selection Archived November 2022

2025 consultations on immigration levels – Final report

Indigenous mobility and Canada’s international borders: Reflecting back and looking forward
2023 consultations on immigration levels – Final report

## How we consult with Canadians
Engagement activities conducted at IRCC are listed on Consulting with Canadians , a website featuring major consultation and engagement initiatives from selected federal government departments and agencies. This page also includes more information on some of our most high-profile consultation and engagement activities, whether they’re currently open and accepting input, or closed within the last five years.
If you’re looking for more information on a past engagement  activity or report that isn’t listed above, or if you have any questions about  engagement at IRCC, please contact our engagement team .
